title: 30% Monthly Return Screenshot
description: A promotional screenshot promises 30% monthly returns, far above ordinary business expectations.

title: Urgent Deadline Message
description: Dimas says the deposit must be made before 16:00 today or the slot will disappear.

title: Missing Registration
description: No valid authority registration can be verified from the scheme's materials.

title: Unclear Akad Document
description: The contract uses religious language but does not clearly define capital, risk, profit sharing, or loss sharing.

title: Referral Bonus Chart
description: Most rewards come from inviting new members, not verified business profit.

title: Naya's Withdrawal Delay
description: Naya attempted to withdraw her funds but received repeated delay excuses.

title: Guaranteed Return Voice Note
description: Dimas says the return is guaranteed and risk-free if Raka joins today.

title: Unverified SME Funding Claim
description: The scheme claims to fund halal SMEs but provides no verifiable business report.

title: Sukuk Alternative Brochure
description: A legitimate Islamic finance alternative with clearer disclosures and different risks.

title: Musyarakah Explanation Note
description: A note explaining partnership-based profit and loss sharing, including the need for transparent terms.
